name: dock
description: Pill-shaped floating navigation bar with icon + label items. Not edge-anchored — sits elevated above the screen surface. Supports 1–5 items and can be composed side-by-side.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of navigation items (1–5 recommended). Each item has key, icon, label, optional disabled and testID.

props.name: activeKey
props.description: Key of the currently active item.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when the user taps an item.

props.name: style
props.description: Custom style override for the dock container.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier for the dock container.
